ref.airbnb.design.reason: The rotating editorial homepage changes even between immediate requests. Automation monitors reachability; the 90-day human cadence remains the content-review gate.

ref.atlassian.content.reason: The official Atlassian page returns an empty client-rendered shell to the observer. Automation checks reachability; scheduled human review verifies the guidance.

ref.atlassian.design-tokens.reason: The official Atlassian page returns an empty client-rendered shell to the observer. Automation checks reachability; scheduled human review verifies the token guidance.

ref.linear.brand.reason: The brand page emits volatile hydration content; headings and link labels retain a stable fingerprint of its published information architecture.
